# UML Wizyty

> An unofficial, human-friendly interface for booking appointments at the Łódź City Office (Urząd Miasta Łodzi), Poland.
> Available in Polish, English, and Ukrainian.
> Created by Aleksander Jarmoszuk — alex@jarmosz.uk
> License: CC BY-SA 4.0

## What this is

The official Łódź City Office booking system (wizyty.uml.lodz.pl) has a poor user experience and no multilingual support. This app wraps the same backend API with a clean, accessible, mobile-friendly UI that anyone can use — including residents who do not speak Polish.

All data is sent directly to the official uml.lodz.pl servers. Nothing is collected or stored by this app.

## What you can book

- **Vehicle registration** (rejestracja pojazdu, pojazdów)
- **Driving licence** matters — new licence, exchange of foreign licence, professional driver qualifications
- **ID card** applications and collection (dowód osobisty) — multiple office locations
- **PESEL registration** — including a dedicated service for Ukrainian citizens
- **Civil registry** (Urząd Stanu Cywilnego) — births, marriages, name changes, record corrections
- **Taxes and fees** — property tax, agricultural tax, transport vehicle tax, waste disposal fees, stamp duty
- **Resident Contact Centre** — general enquiries, trusted profile (profil zaufany), large family cards, lost & found
- **Persons with disabilities** — disability ombudsman meetings, barrier-free card, EU project recruitment
- **Business activity** — alcohol sales permits, transport licences, CEIDG business registration
- **Supervision & inspection** — driving schools, vehicle inspection stations

## How booking works

1. Choose a service category and specific service
2. Pick an available date and time slot from the calendar
3. Enter personal details (name, phone, date of birth, email)
4. Accept terms and consent to data processing
5. Verify your phone number via SMS
6. Receive booking confirmation with ticket number

## Important notes for non-Polish speakers

Staff at Łódź City Office branches may not speak English or Ukrainian. Users are advised to bring a Polish-speaking person or prepare key phrases in advance.

The system is typically offline for maintenance between 00:00 and 03:00 local time (Europe/Warsaw).

## Technical

- Frontend: React + Vite, deployed on Vercel
- API: Proxies requests to wizyty.uml.lodz.pl (no backend required)
- Source: https://github.com/your-repo/uml-wizyty
- Live app: https://uml-wizyty.vercel.app
